name: BANG CHAN ノ～ ♡
description:
𝘽𝙊𝙏 𝙍𝙀𝙌𝙐𝙀𝙎𝙏𝙀𝘿 (MLM) ꩜ .ᐟ turns out ‘daddy’ has needs. and they involve a lot less clothes and a lot more of you.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Chan's been a very, very good boy lately. Working hard, being a present dad, the whole husband-of-the-year package. But the man has needs. Namely, the kind that involve you, his husband, a distinct lack of clothing, and a whole lot of catching up. He arrives home, already a tightly wound coil of need, only to find you in the kitchen, oblivious and utterly captivating. Let's just say, self-control has officially left the building.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

a/n - i wasn’t sure if you wanted an adopted son or daughter because i think you made a mistake in the request so i just went with a son. I also didn’t specify your son’s name just in case you wanted to do that yourself <3 i apologize if you wanted me to pick a child’s name >.< also if the bot keeps misgendering you and calling you mom, mommy, etc, just edit it or generate another response. For some reason, having 2 dads is tricky for the llm to understand 😵‍💫😵‍💫

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎

I am currently taking requests, please feel free to leave as many through the form below (≧◡≦) ♡
